violations.text: Observed a few stained ceiling tiles in kitchen area. The ceiling throughout kitchen, ware-washing, and prep areas is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2026

chicken in hot sauce, eggs & cheese and cheeseburgers was observed held at (130-131) degrees Fahrenheit. Above food was placed in hot hold less than 30 mins before inspection. PIC reheat above foods to (165-166) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Proper hot holding reviewed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

Observed a few stained ceiling tiles in kitchen area. The ceiling throughout kitchen, ware-washing, and prep areas is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH CFP at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
The outside dumpster is missing covers. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2025
The ceiling throughout kitchen, ware-washing, and prep areas is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Application provided to PIC during this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The back receiving door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
Observed one receptacle overloaded with bags of trash. All receptacles were observed opened and uncovered during this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025
The ceiling throughout kitchen, ware-washing, and prep areas is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the hood vents have an accumulation of dust/debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The ceiling throughout kitchen, ware-washing, and prep areas is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024

The ceiling throughout the kitchen, ware-washing, and prep areas is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable (some tiles also observed stained). New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2024
